news.paragraph: The market is currently experiencing mixed movement as strength in chip stocks and significant inflows into DRAM ETFs are being offset by concerns regarding resurgent inflation. Traders should also monitor potential geopolitical shifts from an upcoming Beijing summit, which may serve as a catalyst for major tech holdings like NVIDIA.
